name: Good first issue
about: Small, well-scoped contribution for new contributors
title: ""
labels: good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the small improvement or bug fix.

## Files likely involved

- `src/px4_sitl_toolkit/...`
- `tests/...`
- `examples/...`
- `docs/...`

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Change is focused and documented
- [ ] Tests or example validation added when relevant
- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes

## Notes

Link any PX4/Gazebo/MAVLink documentation that helps a contributor complete the task.
